title: Review Auditor Result Handoff
description: Typed handoff payload produced by review auditors (Backend Review Auditor, Frontend Review Auditor) when handing review verdict and findings to the Orchestration Governor. Compliance is instruction-enforced, not constrained-decoding enforced.

type.description: Payload type discriminator. Must always be 'review_result'.

producedBy.description: Name of the review auditor that produced this payload (e.g., 'Backend Review Auditor', 'Frontend Review Auditor').

producedAt.description: ISO date string (YYYY-MM-DD) when this payload was produced.

workPackage.description: Identifier matching the work unit that was reviewed.

verdict.description: 'pass': no blocking findings; 'fail': critical or high findings require repair before pipeline advancement; 'conditional-pass': low/medium findings noted but pipeline may advance with documented acceptance.

findingsBySeverity.description: Findings grouped by severity. Empty array per level means no findings at that level.

critical.description: Critical findings that block pipeline advancement until fixed.

high.description: High-severity findings that should be fixed before close.

medium.description: Medium-severity findings that should be addressed or accepted with documentation.

codingGamingCheck.description: 'clean': no test modifications found without corresponding source fixes; 'findings': test gaming detected — requires governor escalation before pipeline advancement.

residualRisk.description: Description of any known residual risk accepted in this review. Use 'none' if no residual risk.

recommendedNextAgent.description: Name of the next agent to delegate to: 'governor' if review passed, 'Implementation Specialist' or domain-specific specialist if findings require repair.
